raw_description: Enables Tactical Sprint, but reduces your normal sprint speed.
Fire while sprinting. Improved movement speed while reloading or using Equipment.
Increased movement speed. Jump, slide, and dive further. Faster recovery from sliding and diving.
Undetectable by enemy Scout Pulse and UAV when moving, planting, defusing, or controlling Scorestreaks. Undetectable by Prox Alarm.
Move more quietly.
Two Field Upgrade charges. Booby trap Care Packages. Recharge equipment over time.
Reduces incoming explosive and fire damage.
Resupply ammo and Equipment from killed enemies.
Kill streaking enemies are marked on your minimap and drop Bounty Packs when killed. On respawn, see your killer's last known position for a short duration.
Automatically use dedicated melee when you perform a weapon butt. Melee kills replenish health and earn extra score.
Increased minimap area. Display a HUD icon when you appear on hostile minimaps. Immune to CUAV and Scrambler.
Your explosive damage marks enemies on your minimap. Grant this benefit to all allies. Earn score when they deal explosive damage.
See enemy Equipment and Scorestreaks through walls. Aim at them to see target information. You do not trigger traps or mines.
Resistance to enemy flash, concussion, and gas. You cannot be EMP'ed or Hacked.
Reload and swap weapons faster. Extend fuses when throwing back grenades.
Reduced weapon motion during jumps, wall jumps, slides, and dives. Take less fall damage.
Start each life with +150 score toward Scorestreaks.
Gain the ability to re-earn Scorestreaks in the same life.
Undetectable by AI targeting and thermal optics. Player-controlled Scorestreaks don't highlight you.
See enemy footsteps in the world. ADSing auto-pings enemies. Killing an enemy shows the direction of the next closest enemy on your minimap.
Faster field upgrade charge rate. Grant this benefit to all allies. Earn score when nearby allies use their field upgrades.
Faster healing while capturing and holding objectives. Revive downed teammates faster.
